title: Bump baseline test Fedora to 29
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Bumps the Buildah Baseline Test up to Fedora 29 from 28.

This test is only used "by hand", nothing related to the CI.
